root.name: Center align the title text on slide 4
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent has correctly center aligned the title text on slide 4, without making unnecessary changes to other elements or slides.

children.name: Title text on slide 4 is center aligned
children.description: Checks that the title text box on slide 4 is set to center alignment.

children.name: No unnecessary changes made to other slides or non-title elements on slide 4
children.description: Ensures that only the title text box alignment was changed on slide 4 and no extraneous content was added, removed, or modified elsewhere.

children.name: No changes to slides other than slide 4
children.description: Checks that slides other than slide 4 were not added, removed, or modified.

metadata.task: Center align the title text on slide 4
